# McpTask.TtlMs property

REQUIRED. Task lifetime in milliseconds measured from creation: a non-negative number, or `null` for an unbounded lifetime. After a non-null value has elapsed the server MAY discard the task and answer subsequent queries with the not-found error (§25.4, §25.11).

```csharp
public long? TtlMs { get; set; }
```
